title: Russian Frittata
description: A rich, garlicky twist on the classic Italian dish, inspired by Russian flavors. Perfect for a hearty breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Unsalted butter for greasing the pan

instructions: In a small pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add cooked garlic and chopped dill to the egg mixture and stir well.
Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch (23cm) skillet or oven-safe pan.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the edges are golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the pan.
Slide the frittata onto a serving plate and slice into wedges.
